displayProperties.name: Song of Flame
displayProperties.description:
Unleash your inner fire, making your equipped weapons radiant and enhancing your abilities.

[Melee]  : Release a supercharged melee attack that launches additional projectiles.

[Grenade]  : Create a sentient flame wisp that seeks out targets and detonates in a scorching explosion, then seeks out other nearby targets.

While Song of Flame is active, you and nearby allies regenerate abilities more quickly, are more resistant to incoming damage, and your [Solar] Solar and Kinetic weapons scorch targets.

displayProperties.name: Borealis Catalyst
displayProperties.description: Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

displayProperties.name: Mindstriders
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament to change the appearance of Transversive Steps. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Forge's Kin
displayProperties.description: Black Armory weapon final blows briefly grant ammo generation, reload speed, and damage against combatants when the weapon is redrawn. Buff potency and duration increases for each equipped Black Armory weapon.

displayProperties.name: Storm's Edge
displayProperties.description:
Summon an electrified dagger and throw it in your aim direction.

When the dagger hits a surface or a target, you blink to its location and perform a powerful whirling strike, damaging any nearby targets. Can be reactivated after the strike to perform additional throws.

If the dagger flies for long enough without impacting anything, it detonates and you blink to the detonation location.

displayProperties.name: Plaguebreaker Grips
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Head Rush
displayProperties.description: Sliding or standing up after crouching for a short time grants this weapon a brief period of improved bonus handling, reload speed, and damage against Hive combatants.

displayProperties.name: Blade Ammo
displayProperties.description: Improves ammo capacity.

displayProperties.name: Proud Sigil
displayProperties.description: Modifications for your ship's transmat systems, so you'll always arrive in style.

displayProperties.name: Dendrite Shimmer Boots
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Ancillary Ordinance
displayProperties.description: Rapid elemental final blows and final blows on targets affected by elemental debuffs periodically prepare a homing micro-missile, which is launched from your target after this weapon's next final blow. More missiles can be prepared.

displayProperties.name: High Ground
displayProperties.description: Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of bonus damage. Attacking targets from higher ground immediately grants the maximum number of stacks. Increases reload.

displayProperties.name: Tri-Planar Mass Driver
displayProperties.description: Fires a spread of Void energy projectiles. Aiming down sights narrows the spread.
